title: Methods of Preparation of Carbonyl Compounds

concepts.title: Decarboxylation of beta-Keto Carboxylic Acid
concepts.conceptBody:
Decarboxylation of $\mathbf{\beta }$-keto Carboxylic acid

$\beta $-keto acids on slightest warming alone or in presence of base undergoes ready removal of $\text{C}{{\text{O}}_{2}}$.

Mechanism:
